name: Lily
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 223; Episode 146

Lily was first seen with Sarquiss on Jaya Island. She was the only member of the minor crew members in Bellamy's crew that was openly named. Lily appeared in most of the events the crew were involved with during the Jaya Arc. She was last seen when Donquixote Doflamingo came to punish Bellamy.   Lily seemed to boast the same overconfident personality that the rest of her crewmates demonstrated. She was most noted for telling Sarquiss not to waste money on Luffy, Zoro and Nami when he threw money at them and acted snobby towards them believing them to be beneath her. When Nami rejects Sarquiss who had asked to buy her off the Straw Hat Pirates she and Mani exchange glances of disbelief.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
